students.name: Nivedita Rao
students.department: School of Liberal Arts and Sciences
students.bio: Nivedita leads TGA's strategic planning and member engagement. She works closely with student volunteers to keep field activities consistent and safe.

students.name: Arjun Menon
students.department: School of Computer Science and Engineering
students.bio: Arjun coordinates weekly birding routes and beginner onboarding. He also supports checklist quality review for GBBC and eBird events.

students.name: Samiksha Pai
students.bio: Samiksha drives TGA's awareness campaigns and partnerships. She designs communication around cleanup drives and sustainability events.

students.name: Dharini N
students.department: School of Liberal Arts and Sciences
students.bio: Dharini maintains species logs and observation workflows for the campus assessment. She helps volunteers use iNaturalist for clean and useful submissions.

students.name: Karthik Iyer
students.bio: Karthik supports logistics, volunteer coordination, and on-ground execution during field events. He focuses on participant safety and smooth event flow.

faculty.name: Dr. Meera Joshi
faculty.department: School of Liberal Arts and Sciences
faculty.bio: Dr. Joshi mentors TGA's ecological initiatives and supports research alignment across student projects. Her guidance helps bridge field activity with academic rigor.

faculty.name: Dr. Raghav Hegde
faculty.department: School of Computer Science and Engineering
faculty.bio: Dr. Hegde supports data workflows, dashboard planning, and technology integration for biodiversity documentation. He advises students on responsible data handling.
